generatedBy: rork-agent Expo build 16 — automatic owner sign-in eliminated
matchDetail: Expo source is at e3149d5. Render live backend and /version report 0b37191f. They do not match because the GitHub token used to sync commits to the GitHub repo connected to Render is expired (HTTP 401). New commits exist only on the Rork git router.

apk.buildMethod: expo prebuild --clean + gradlew assembleRelease (local, Watchman disabled)

authAudit.rootCause: initAuth() called getSession() which returned the persisted Supabase session from AsyncStorage, then passed it to handleSession() which set isAuthenticated: true without manual credentials.
authAudit.secondaryCause: loadStoredAuth() + refreshSession() path at lines 1508-1534 (original) also restored sessions without manual login
authAudit.tertiaryCause: onAuthStateChange handler accepted TOKEN_REFRESHED events and called handleSession() without checking manualOwnerLoginRef
authAudit.fix: initAuth now calls supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' }) on cold launch, clearing any persisted session. onAuthStateChange now checks manualOwnerLoginRef.current before accepting any session. manualOwnerLoginRef is set to true only inside login(), loginOwnerPasswordless(), and verify2FA() — never during cold launch.

expoApp.detail: Expo app at expo/ is the only approved app. Android package com.ivxholdings.app, version 1.4.3, versionCode 16, 240 routes.

easBuild.detail: EAS CLI requires an Expo user account. EXPO_TOKEN is not set in the sandbox. APK was built locally instead.

github.detail: GitHub token expired (HTTP 401). GitHub repo ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest has commit 0b37191f. New commits pushed to Rork git router but not synced to GitHub due to expired token.

fixesApplied: BUILD 16 FIX: Replaced initAuth() to call supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' }) on cold launch — clears any persisted Supabase session from AsyncStorage so the owner must enter credentials manually every time.

BUILD 16 FIX: Added manualOwnerLoginRef gate in onAuthStateChange — ignores any session event (including TOKEN_REFRESHED) unless manualOwnerLoginRef is true, which is only set inside login(), loginOwnerPasswordless(), and verify2FA().
BUILD 16 FIX: Changed manualOwnerLoginRef to be set unconditionally for all manual login paths (not just owner emails) — the gate applies to every user.
BUILD 14 FIX: Diagnostics banner visible prop bound to diagnosticsBannerVisible state (was hardcoded true).
BUILD 14 FIX: Diagnostics banner defaults to false in all runtimes.
BUILD 14 FIX: runtime-environment.ts classifies bare-workflow release APK as standalone/production.
BUILD 14 FIX: build-info.ts reads from Constants.expoConfig.extra and checks __DEV__ first.
Confirmed lib/supabase.ts has persistSession: true with AsyncStorage adapter.
remainingWork: Install build 16 APK on real device and verify: cold launch shows login screen (no automatic owner sign-in), manual login works, Owner AI works after manual login, diagnostics banner hidden by default.
blockers: EXPO_TOKEN / Expo account is not available in the sandbox; APK was built locally instead of via EAS.
GitHub token is expired, so the GitHub repo connected to Render cannot receive new commits. Render remains at 0b37191f while local Expo source is at e3149d5.
